title: The Graveyard - Rebalanced Loots
description: A Datapack that rebalances the insane loot-tables of The Graveyard mod!
body:
# [The Graveyard](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-graveyard-fabric) - Rebalanced Loots

### This datapack has been archived due to how [The Graveyard](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-graveyard-fabric) hardcodes most of the loot, resulting in a situation that I can't do more about. Sorry.

---


<details>
<summary>Old Description</summary>

This datapack is simply aiming to make the loottables of The Graveyard Forge, Fabric, and Resurrected version to have less OP loot.

Totems, Ancient Debris, Netherite Scraps, Netherite Ingots and all the Enchanted Golden Apples are removed from the loot tables and mostly every value is tweaked to create a more balanced experience.

</details>
